experience.title: Full-Stack Developer

Deployed organization-level data isolation, RBAC permissions, and efficient database partitioning strategies.
Premium CRM modules with features like real-time transaction validation, payment gateway integrations (SSLCommerz), media library management and campaign automation etc.
Developed RESTful APIs, and integrated RabbitMQ as a message broker for asynchronous processing.
Optimized performance with bulk operations, Redis caching and full-text search powered by Elasticsearch.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, Dockerized deployments.
